results.title: 🚨 Club World Cup: Spain could lose two stars to injury!
results.description: Disaster for Spain!What should have been a victory has turned into a nightmare. As soon as the final whistle blew after Spain’s win over Uruguay on matchday three of Group H, all eyes were on Yeremy...

results.title: Morocco footballer Hakimi appeals rape trial order
results.description: An appeals court confirmed on June 19 that the Moroccan national team and Paris Saint-Germain player would stand trial in criminal court over the alleged rape of a woman in 2023, an accusation he has repeatedly denied.

results.title: Where Shrewsbury Town fans will remember the club’s new striker from
results.description: Striker Josh Davison joined Shrewsbury Town on Friday.
